heading: Short title
label: 2101 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Trade Act of 1974”.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , which in addition to enacting this chapter enacted , amended sections 160, 162, 163, 164, 170a, 1202, 1303, 1315, 1321, 1330, 1332, 1333, 1337, 1352, 1484, 1516, 1806, 1862, 1872, 1885, and 1981 of this title, sections 5312, 5314, 5315, and 5316 of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, , Census, , Internal Revenue Code, sections 2631 and 2632 of Title 28, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure, and section 665 of former Title 31, Money and Finance, repealed sections 1802, 1803, 1804, 1805, 1822, 1831, 1832, 1833, 1841, 1842, 1843, 1844, 1845, 1846, 1861, 1871, 1873, 1882, 1883, 1884, 1886, 1901, 1902, 1911, 1912, 1913, 1914, 1915, 1917, 1931, 1941, 1942, 1943, 1944, 1951, 1952, 1961, 1962, 1963, 1971, 1972, 1973, 1974, 1975, 1976, 1977, 1978, and 1991 of this title, and enacted provisions set out as notes under this section and sections 160, 162, 1303, 1321, 1337, 1484, 1515, 1516, 1901, and 2271 of this title and , Census.Pub. L. 93–618section 1863 of this titlesection 301 of Title 13section 3302 of Title 26section 301 of Title 13

References to Other Laws Deemed References to Trade Act of 1974, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 93–618, title VI, § 602(f)88 Stat. 2072Pub. L. 96–39, title XI, § 1106(h)(3)93 Stat. 313Jan. 3, 1975July 26, 1979“All provisions of law (other than this Act [this chapter], the Trade Expansion Act of 1962 [chapter 7 of this title], and the Trade Agreements Extension Act of 1951 [see Short Title of 1951 Amendment note set out under ]), in effect after the date of enactment of this Act [], referring to section 350 of the Tariff Act of 1930 [], to that section as amended, to the Act entitled ‘An Act to amend the Tariff Act of 1930,’ approved [enacting sections 1352, 1353, and 1354 and amending ], to that Act as amended or to the Trade Expansion Act of 1962, or to agreements entered into, or proclamations issued, or actions taken under any of such provisions, shall be construed, unless clearly precluded by the context, to refer also to this Act, or to agreements entered into or proclamations or orders issued pursuant to this Act.”section 1654 of this titlesection 1351 of this titlesection 1351 of this titleJan. 3, 1975June 12, 1934

Short Title of 2022 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–110, § 1136 Stat. 1159Apr. 8, 2022“This Act [enacting provisions set out as a note under and amending provisions formerly set out as a note under , Foreign Relations and Intercourse] may be cited as the ‘Suspending Normal Trade Relations with Russia and Belarus Act’.”section 2434 of this titlesection 2656 of Title 22

L. 114–27, § 1(a)129 Stat. 362June 29, 2015“This Act [see Tables for classification] may be cited as the ‘Trade Preferences Extension Act of 2015’.”, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–344, § 1(a)124 Stat. 3611Dec. 29, 2010“This Act [amending sections 58c, 2296, 2317, 2318, 2345, 2371d to 2371f, 2372, 2373, 2373a, 2401g, 3202, 3203, and 3206 of this title, sections 35, 4980B, 7527, and 9801 of Title 26, Internal Revenue Code, sections 1162, 1181, and 2918 of Title 29, Labor, and sections 300bb–2 and 300gg of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, enacting provisions set out as a note preceding and notes under sections 35, 4980B, 6655, 7527, and 9801 of Title 26, and amending provisions set out as notes preceding ] may be cited as the ‘Omnibus Trade Act of 2010’.”section 2271 of this titlesection 2271 of this title

L. 93–618, title VI, § 60588 Stat. 2073Jan. 3, 1975“If any provision of this Act [see References in Text note above], or the application of any provision to any circumstances or persons shall be held invalid, the validity of the remainder of this Act, and of the application of such provision to other circumstances or persons, shall not be affected thereby.”
